# Vibration of Effects

Vibration of effects makes the adjustment-set choice the focus. `voe()`
summarises the distribution, and `voe_volcano()` plots the exponentiated effect
against `-log10(p)` for every model [@patel2015].

```r
voe(results)
voe_volcano(results, colour = n_adjusters)
```

The relative ratio (99th over 1st percentile of the exponentiated effect)
quantifies the vibration in one number, and the Janus fraction flags a sign that
flips across defensible models.
